sql: SELECT T2.account_id FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(T1.date AS DATE)) = 1997 AND T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' ORDER BY T1.amount LIMIT 1;
